title: No Cooldowns
description: Removes various cooldowns in the game
body:
## Description

_In the world of Minecraft, where survival is a constant test of reflexes, tactics, and patience, cooldowns may well be the player’s greatest enemy. Think back: if not for those delays, you might have saved yourself in that battle, or claimed victory in the fight that still lingers in your memory._

_This mod removes the delays and cooldowns that keep you from acting quickly. You will be able to carve through hordes of mobs and click any enemy to death within seconds, instantly swallow a vital potion or steak to regain strength. Your shield will never lose consciousness and will be ready to block attacks again and again, while your bow fires arrows like a machine gun._

_Yet remember: the most significant and relentless cooldown in the game — your own reaction time._

_Defeat it._

## Configuration

<details>
<summary>No_Cooldowns.json</summary>

```
{
  "===|====================|===": "=========|",
  "======| No Cooldowns |======": {
    "Enabled": true
  },
  "=========| Player |=========": {
    "Attack and Damage Delay": false,
    "Item Swap Cooldown": false,
    "Always Critical Hit": true,
    "Instant Eat": true,
    "Health Regeneration Delay": false,
    "Instant Air Refill": true,
    "No Suffocation in Blocks": true,
    "Low Hunger Sprinting": true,
    "Persistent Sprinting": true,
    "No Fall Damage While Riding": true,
    "Easy Lava Swimming": true,
    "Easy Powder Snow Escaping": true,
    "Safe Magma Bubble Columns": true,
    "Safe Void": true,
    "Mining Cooldown": false,
    "No Mining Slowdown": true,
    "Gaining Experience Orbs Cooldown": false,
    "Bed Sleeping Delay": false
  },
  "=========| Blocks |=========": {
    "Fast Furnace Smelting": true,
    "Fast Campfire Cooking": true,
    "Fast Potion Brewing": true,
    "Custom Beacon Effect Range": true,
    "Fixed Beacon Effect Range": 180.0,
    "Custom Bell Effect Radius": true,
    "Fixed Bell Effect Radius": 180.0,
    "Fast Brush Archaeology": true,
    "No Falling Suspicious Block": true,
    "Shovel-Proof Suspicious Block": true,
    "Instant Cauldron Filling": true
  },
  "=========| Items  |=========": {
    "Instant Bow Shot": true,
    "Instant Trident Throw": true,
    "Instant Trident Return": true,
    "Instant Spear Piercing": true,
    "Persistent Spear Hold": true,
    "No Lunge Durability Loss": true,
    "No Lunge Exhaustion": true,
    "Allow Lunge While Elytra": true,
    "No Elytra Kinetic Damage": true,
    "Shield Cooldown": false,
    "Ender Pearl Cooldown": false,
    "Chorus Fruit Cooldown": false,
    "Wind Charge Cooldown": false
  },
  "=========|  Mobs  |=========": {
    "Villager Trade Limits": false,
    "Piglin Barter Delay": false,
    "Mob Breeding Cooldown": false,
    "Fast Zombie Villager Cure": true,
    "Horse Jump Cooldown": false,
    "Camel Jump Cooldown": false,
    "Standable Striders": true,
    "Instant Ghast Rotation": true
  },
  "====|  Spawner Tweaks  |====": {
    "Custom Spawner Cooldown": true,
    "Spawner Cooldown": 60,
    "Custom Spawner Spawn Limit": true,
    "Spawner Spawn Limit": 20,
    "Custom Spawner Spawn Count": true,
    "Spawner Spawn Count": 3,
    "Use Spawner Exceptions List": true,
    "Spawner Exceptions List": "minecraft:blaze,minecraft:silverfish,minecraft:magma_cube,minecraft:cave_spider"
  },
  "=====|  Boat Tweaks  |======": {
    "Boat Jump": true,
    "Boat Jump Height": 0.5,
    "Custom Boat Speed On Land": true,
    "Boat Land Speed": 2.0,
    "Custom Boat Turn Speed": true,
    "Boat Turn Speed": 2.0,
    "Free Look in Boats": true
  },
  "=====|  Horse Tweaks  |=====": {
    "Custom Horse Jump Strength": false,
    "Horse Jump Strength": 1.0,
    "Max Fall Distance for Horses": 25,
    "Custom Horse Speed": false,
    "Fixed Speed for Horses": 1.0
  },
  "=====|  Camel Tweaks  |=====": {
    "Custom Camel Jump Height": false,
    "Camel Jump Height": 2.0,
    "Max Fall Distance for Camels": 25,
    "Custom Camel Speed": false,
    "Fixed Speed for Camels": 1.0
  },
  "===| Happy Ghast Tweaks |===": {
    "Custom Ghast Speed": false,
    "Fixed Speed for Ghasts": 1.0
  },
  "============================": "=========|"
}
```

</details>

### Commands

- `/nocooldowns` `reload`				:: Reloads the configuration

- `/nocooldowns` `config`				:: Opens the config file

- `/nocooldowns` `enable/disable`		:: Enable / disable the mod

- `/nocooldowns` `status`				:: Shows the mod’s current status


## Key Features

> Note: Animated GIFs on this page may load slowly. Try refreshing the page if you don't see them.

### Every hit is a critical hit

![The player always deals a critical hit to a zombie just by standing still](https://i.ibb.co/wh2bJX1N/No-CDfragment8.gif)

### No cooldown between hits

![The player clicks on the zombie and quickly kills it soon after](https://i.ibb.co/kV3bDKLY/No-CDfragment6.gif)

### Fast health regeneration

![The player takes heavy fall damage, but health regenerates quickly](https://i.ibb.co/xKxJT1qv/No-CDHealth.gif)

### No item-swap cooldown

![The player instantly equips heavy items in their inventory: a pickaxe, sword, axe, trident, and hammer](https://i.ibb.co/r2c1mFd4/No-CDSwap.gif)

### Food and drinks are swallowed in a split second

![The player eats several items from the inventory at once](https://i.ibb.co/sdLNcBjn/No-CDfragment1.gif)

### Fire a hail of arrows like an automatic weapon

![The player quickly shoots arrows from a bow](https://i.ibb.co/tSqRn8x/No-CDfragment4.gif)

### Rapid spear piercing attacks

![The player quickly uses a piercing attack from a spear with the Lunge enchantment to fly over the cliff](https://i.ibb.co/Xr2jcgbz/No-CDLunge-Spear.gif)

### Shields no longer get stunned by heavy hits

![The shield no longer has a cooldown and continues to protect the player.](https://i.ibb.co/R4VgQnX1/No-CDfragment3.gif)

### No cooldown on gaining experience orbs

![The player quickly gains experience orbs](https://i.ibb.co/1YVHmC4q/No-CDfragment13.gif)

### No cooldown after using Ender Pearls, Chorus Fruit or Wind Charge

![The player immediately throws three ender pearls in different directions without a cooldown](https://i.ibb.co/5XpdpLwh/No-CDfragment5.gif)

### No mob breeding cooldown

![The player feeds the sheep three times](https://i.ibb.co/fVwV6sKM/No-CDfragment12.gif)

### Unlimited villager trades

![The image shows unlimited trading with villagers: the player sells sticks from their inventory for emeralds without hitting a trade limit. The villager never runs out of stock, eliminating the need to visit or interact with their workstation](https://i.ibb.co/Z1fZY18z/No-CDTrades.gif)

### No mining cooldown

![A split image that demonstrates the speed of breaking blocks](https://i.ibb.co/FbGDJdDB/No-CDfragment14.gif)

### Horses and camels have no jump cooldown

![The player constantly jumps on the camel](https://i.ibb.co/35MQNTH2/No-CDfragment9.gif)

### and EVEN MORE useful features!

_Explore the configuration to discover the full arsenal of the mod — every available setting, every hidden advantage. Shape your gameplay exactly the way you desire._

_Go forth, and let nothing slow you down._ 

_Enjoy your newfound freedom._
